Sample the latent field [S | Y] (Poisson, non-nested) via C++ MALA

Source: R/sampling.R
laplace_sampling.Rd

Fast drop-in for SDALGCP::Laplace.sampling() for the Poisson, non-nested case: the Laplace mode (Newton) and the adaptive MALA loop both run in C++. Given the same mode/covariance and seed it reproduces the original R sampler bit-for-bit.

Usage

laplace_sampling(mu, Sigma, y, units.m, control.mcmc)

Arguments

mu

prior mean vector.

Sigma

prior covariance matrix.

y

count vector.

units.m

offset vector.

control.mcmc

list from control_mcmc.

Value

list with samples (kept x n matrix) and h (step sizes).
